title: Musk, Altman, and OpenAI Are in Court. The Real Fight Is Over Control.
author: Julian Mercado
dek: The lawsuit is not only a founder feud. It is a legal test of how AI labs govern mission promises after they become capital-intensive infrastructure companies.
imageAlt: A courtroom silhouette over code and corporate logos representing the OpenAI governance dispute
imageCaptionHtml: Illustrative thumbnail for coverage of the Musk, Altman, and OpenAI court dispute.
imageCreditPlain: Illustrative thumbnail for coverage of the Musk, Altman, and OpenAI court dispute.
excerpt: The legal battle between Musk and OpenAI leadership could set a precedent for how AI labs balance founding mission claims with later commercial governance.
